positive: A dynamic, stylized depiction of a mountain cityscape at sunrise. The scene features jagged, clean silhouettes of futuristic buildings blended into the dramatic peaks of mountain ranges. A stylized, ethereal river of glowing light winds through the valleys, reflecting the warm gradient colors of the rising sun (gold, soft orange, deep violet). Include geometric patterns subtly integrated into the architecture and surrounding landscape. The composition must be centered and high-contrast, suitable for an apparel print. Style: Neo-Art Deco, Synthwave, Graphic Vector Illustration. Lighting: High contrast, rim lighting, volumetric fog. Color Palette: Complementary contrasts of sapphire blue, deep slate grey, and warm gold/orange.
negative: blur, noisy, grainy, text, signature, logo, watermark, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distorted, poorly drawn hands, blurry background, complex background, dirty, stained
